SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AppConstants
A utility class that stores constant values used throughout the application, such as the application name and version.
Cashier
Represents the cashier staff responsible for processing sales.
CashierDashboard
Layer 1: Presentation Layer (GUI).
Chef
Represents the Chef/Baker who manages the production of sweets.
ChefDashboard
Layer 1: Presentation Layer (GUI).
Customer
Represents a customer in the sweets shop system.
CustomerHome
Layer 1: Presentation Layer (GUI).
DatabaseManager
Layer 4: Infrastructure Layer.
Inventory
Manages the stock levels of sweets and products.
Invoice
Handles the generation of a physical text-based invoice.
ISortable
Custom Interface to satisfy Advanced OOP requirements.
LoginFrame
Layer 1: Presentation Layer (GUI).
MainDashboard
Layer 1: Presentation Layer (GUI).
Manager
Represents the Shop Manager with administrative privileges.
Order
Represents a customer's order entity.
OrderItem
Represents an individual item within a customer's order.
Product
Represents a sweet product entity in the shop.
ProductRepository
Repository for Product-related database operations.
ProductService
 
ReportService
 
SalesRepository
Repository for Sales and Order-tracking operations.
SalesService
 
User
Abstract class representing a general user in the sweets shop system.
UserRepository
Repository for User-related database operations.
UserService
